config_1759025879573_468655730975703041.explanatoryText: We're looking for newbie or alumni/newbie pairs for our next Blood vs Water season. Starts Oct 31!

questions.questionText: Can you tell us a little bit about yourself? Some org history or a cool story from another game you've played?
How did you find out about our game?
Have you seen any of the Final Destination movies? Which is your favorite and, of course, which is your favorite death scene?
As this is a Blood vs Water season, everybody is required to play with a partner. Can you tell us who your partner is, and what we can expect from them?

Is there anything that may hinder your enjoyent of the game? Things such as color blindness, etc

Also, is there anyone on your DNP list?
Do you have anything to add that will help you stand out above all the other applicants?

config_1759102758454_468655730975703041.explanatoryText: We're looking for 2-3 FULL TIME hosts for the next  few seasons. Only ages 21+ please!

questions.questionText: Why would you like to join the team?
What times of day are you generally available to help out?
Which areas are you most comfortable helping out with?

Are you comfortable doing any of the following:
 - spec engagement
 - recruiting new players
 - Edgic
 - exit interviews
 - setting up bot commands
Do you have any prior hosting experience? Which servers and what was your role there?
Do you have any ideas that could help improve Servivorg at all?

Finally, if brought on, do you promise:
 - to be actively available
 - to give prior notice if you need to step away
 - represent us in a positive light in other servers

questions.questionText: Can you please tell us your preferred name, pronouns, timezone and age?
Can you give us a brief rundown of some other games you may have played before? Any wins or awards you'd like to share?

questions.questionTitle: WHERE DID YOU HEAR ABOUT US?
questions.questionText: Where did you hear about this game/server? Were you invited, see an ad, etc?
Have you ever played a Final Fantasy game and, if so, which is your favorite? Don't worry - this won't affect your casting!
What are your favorite type of challenges? Are there any you really hate?
We try to make the server as inclusive as possible, so we're wondering if there's anything that could alter your enjoyment of the game. Also, do you have a PC and/or mobile?
Is there anyone in the community that is on your "DO NOT PLAY" list and, if so, why? We will do our best to accommodate everyone.
Is there anything else you'd like to add to help us in our casting decision? The more info the better!

metadata.description: Second chances. 36 player season of madness!
Former tribes prior to Tribe Swap on 3/22/2026

challenge_94b406b1f279.title: 🎨Spreadsheet Art
challenge_94b406b1f279.description:
> You will be racing to recreate an image by coloring in cells in a provided Google Spreadsheet

Your goal is to recreate the image provided as fast as possible by coloring in the spreadsheet cells, with as few errors as possible. Each mistake will add 30 seconds to your total time.

A color bank is provided in the spreadsheet which has all of the colors from the image, which you can copy and paste. Colors must be exact - do not guess - only use the color bank.

**```🏁 How to Start```**
You will be starting this challenge from <:castbot_sv:1490279090241146940> CastBot. In your subs:
1. Type <:castbot_sv:1490279090241146940> `/menu`
2. Click 🏃 Challenges
3. Select 🎨 START - Spreadsheet Art - *Your Name* to start the challenge and timer.

You then receive from CastBot two items. One will be a screenshot of spreadsheet art image (which will be the same for everyone), and the second will be a link your personal blank Google spreadsheet with a grid and color bank.

> ⚠️ Your timer starts as soon as you select Spreadsheet Art in step 3, so be ready. Your timer stops when you've  pinged production with a screenshot of your completed spreadsheet art in your submission channel.

**```🖼️ Example```**
An example of this challenge being run can be seen below, the left image is what the player received when starting the challenge, and the right their completed spreadsheet after coloring it in.
